prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: db_1208 Product Type: FLASHLIGHT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Cree XPE Bulb 3 Watt Aluminum Body Flashlight Pocket Clip & Lanyard Description: The ASR Outdoor Cree XPE Flashlight is great for keeping around the house, in the car or bringing along outdoors activities. Each flashlight comes with a Cree XPE Bulb, and puts out between 120 and 140 lumens. At just 3375" in length, it's the perfect size to stash in your backpack, purse, glove compartment or tool box.

These flashlights come with a pocket clip and lanyard for easy storage and transportability. Its black aluminum body will stand the test of time and keep it from becoming scratched and dirty.

Make sure to keep one of these around in case of an emergency!

Requires 1AA Battery (Not Included).

Package Includes:
-(1) ASR Outdoor 3 Watt Cree XPE Flashlight Search Terms: camping Features: - Cree XPE Bulb - 120-140 Lumens - Length: 3.75" - Pocket Clip - Aluminum Body === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3.75" Black Aluminum Cree XPE Flashlight

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3 Watt Cree XPE Aluminum Flashlight

anthropic.title_differentiation: 120-140 Lumens, Pocket Clip And Lanyard, Compact Portable Design, AA Battery Powered

openai.title_differentiation: 120-140 Lumens, Cree XPE Bulb, Pocket Clip, Lanyard, Black Aluminum Body, 375" Compact Size, 1 AA Battery Required
